bird.name: 條紋傘鳥
bird.summary: 條紋傘鳥（Cotinga maculata），又名帶斑傘鳥，是巴西東南部特有的傘鳥。牠們棲息在熱帶低地的潮濕森林，但受到失去棲息地的威脅。目前被IUCN列为濒危物种。 其种加词“maculata”意为“有斑点的”。

locations.name: 大西洋沿岸森林
locations.summary: 大西洋沿岸森林 （葡萄牙語：Mata Atlântica）是一片涵盖热带亚热带湿润阔叶林、热带亚热带干旱阔叶林、熱帶亞熱帶草地、稀樹草原和疏灌叢和红树林于一体的热带雨林保护区，位于巴西大西洋沿岸，最北到达北里约格朗德州，最南到达南里奥格兰…

relations.subject: 條紋傘鳥
relations.evidence: It inhabits the canopy of the lowland Atlantic forest, and has a diet of seeds, berries, especially from Byrsonima sericea and ficuses, fruit, caterpillars, and other insects

relations.subject: 條紋傘鳥
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss as its population is estimated to number between 250 and 999 mature individuals
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 條紋傘鳥
relations.evidence: The greatest threat to the banded cotinga's survival is deforestation
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
